name: Chili Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl combine tomato, corn, black beans, cilantro, lime juice, sugar and salt; set aside.
2. On waxed paper, combine flour, chili powder and salt. Coat pork chops with chili powder mixture.
3. In a nonstick 12-inch skillet, heat margarine over medium heat; add pork chops and cook about 8 minutes or until tender and the pork just loses its pink color.
4. Serve pork chops with corn salad.
Notes: Per Serving: 400 calories 14g fat
